---
title: "[Title]"
author: "[Author]"
institute: "[Institution]"
date: "[Date/Venue]"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, custom.scss]
    slide-number: true
    navigation-mode: linear
    controls: true
    progress: true
    hash-type: number
    center: false
    auto-stretch: true
    fig-align: center
    fig-format: pdf
    code-fold: true
    scrollable: false
    smaller: false
    transition: none
    width: 1600
    height: 900
bibliography: ../../paper/references.bib
csl: apa.csl
---

## Research Question {.center}

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
[One-sentence research question]
:::

## What We Find

- [Main result in plain language]
- [Magnitude and significance]
- [Why it matters]

## Roadmap

1. Motivation & Background
2. Data
3. Empirical Strategy
4. Results
5. Robustness
6. Implications

---

## {.center}

::: {.r-fit-text}
**Motivation**
:::

## [Motivating Fact or Puzzle]

![](../../paper/figures/fig_motivation.pdf){fig-align="center" width="80%"}

::: {.notes}
Speaker notes go here.
:::

---

## {.center}

::: {.r-fit-text}
**Data**
:::

## Data

| | Mean | SD | N |
|---|---|---|---|
| [Variable 1] | | | |
| [Variable 2] | | | |

::: {.aside}
Source: [Dataset name], [years].
:::

---

## {.center}

::: {.r-fit-text}
**Empirical Strategy**
:::

## Identification

$$
Y_{it} = \alpha + \beta D_{it} + X_{it}'\gamma + \mu_i + \lambda_t + \varepsilon_{it}
$$

- $\beta$: [what it captures]
- Key assumption: [identification assumption]

---

## {.center}

::: {.r-fit-text}
**Results**
:::

## Main Result

![](../../paper/figures/fig_main_result.pdf){fig-align="center" width="80%"}

## [Result Interpretation]

- Point estimate: [magnitude]
- [Economic interpretation]
- [Comparison to literature]

---

## {.center}

::: {.r-fit-text}
**Robustness**
:::

## [Robustness Check 1]

![](../../paper/figures/fig_robustness.pdf){fig-align="center" width="80%"}

---

## {.center}

::: {.r-fit-text}
**Conclusion**
:::

## Takeaway

1. [Main finding]
2. [Policy implication or mechanism]
3. [What's next]

---

## {.center .appendix}

::: {.r-fit-text}
**Backup Slides**
:::

## Backup: [Topic]

[Content for Q&A]

## References
